# Smilist Dental Clinic - robots.txt
# https://smilist.com (replace with your actual domain when deployed)

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap for search engines and crawlers
Sitemap: https://smilist.com/sitemap.xml

# AI crawlers - allow indexing so AI can discover and cite this site
# OpenAI (ChatGPT)
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

# OpenAI (ChatGPT - images)
User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

# Anthropic (Claude)
User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# Google (Bard / Gemini)
User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

# Perplexity
User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

# Common search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
